name.description: Display name shown on the card.

tagline.description: Optional short curated line. Leave empty to use the live GitHub description.

repo.description: GitHub repo as owner/name. Drives all live enrichment.

path.description: Optional subdirectory within the repo for a monorepo app. Links and README point to this folder; stars and dates come from the parent repo.

s1_products.description: SentinelOne product areas this app touches.

author.description: Display author or org. Defaults to the repo owner if empty.

logo.description: Optional path to a logo image. Falls back to the owner avatar from GitHub.
